name: POS / B2B Software Lead
blurb: Bahi POS–style lead qualification for any B2B software reseller.

config.greeting_text: Assalam o Alaikum 🙏 Bahi POS mein aap ki dilchaspi ka shukriya.
config.facts_features: Inventory, billing, multi-branch reports, WhatsApp order sync.
config.facts_pricing_note: Packages start from a monthly subscription — quote after demo.
config.facts_claims_note: Used by retailers, pharmacies, and restaurants across Pakistan.

english.greeting_text: Assalam o Alaikum! Thanks for your interest in our POS software.

lead.greeting_line: Assalam o Alaikum 🙏 Bahi POS mein aap ki dilchaspi ka shukriya.
lead.value_line: Bahi POS aap ke business ki sales, stock, khata aur invoicing ko ek jagah manage karta hai.

faq.question: Price kitna hai?
faq.answer: Pricing aap ke business size ke mutabiq hai — demo mein personalised quote milti hai.

faq.question: Demo kitni der ka hota hai?
faq.answer: Laga bhag 20–30 minutes. Online ya on-site, aap ke hisaab se.
